_comment: Example Qwen3 reference-voice registry (#311). Copy to /models/qwen3/voices.json on the model PVC (or bake into the image under assets/voices/voices.json alongside the clips). Audio/text paths are relative to this file. 'text' is optional — if omitted the provider reads the sibling .txt next to the audio. Each voice can have one clip per language; selection is by voice + the spoken language, falling back to the voice's default_language, then the default_voice, then ref_audio.mp3. Drop in more clips any time — no rebuild needed.
